prompt:
Overall house check at 10:00. Current observed state:
Livingroom light on, fan 50%, PIR no motion, temperature 24.8C.
Hallway left light on, right light on, fan 30%, main door 100% (fully open), PIR no motion, temperature 25.0C.
Bedroom room light off, bed light off, balcony light off, fan 0%, curtain 50%, lock unlocked, pump off, PIR no motion, temperature 26.2C, outside temperature 28.5C, moisture 40%.

Note: Nobody is home, owner left for work at 08:00.
eval_note: Correct if the agent recognizes nobody is home and secures the house: close door, lock bedroom, turn off unnecessary lights and fans. Energy savings and security are priorities when nobody is home.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant S as ScheduleSession
participant A as Agent
participant C as ApplianceController
S->>A: Nobody home but house wide open
A->>C: set espID=1 led1=false
A->>C: set espID=1 motor1=0
A->>C: set espID=2 led1=false
A->>C: set espID=2 led2=false
A->>C: set espID=2 motor1=0
A->>C: set espID=2 motor2=0
A->>C: set espID=3 servo=true
A->>C: set espID=3 motor2=0
C-->>A: success
A-->>S: report house secured and energy saved, nobody home

prompt: I smell gas in the hallway! What should I do?
eval_note: Correct if the agent recognizes this as a life-threatening emergency. Should advise NOT using electrical switches (which could spark), open the main door for ventilation (override security concern), advise evacuating immediately, and call emergency services. Should NOT turn on fans as electric motors could ignite gas.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant U as User
participant A as Agent
participant C as ApplianceController
U->>A: Gas smell emergency
A->>C: set espID=2 motor2=100
C-->>A: success
A-->>U: EMERGENCY - open door for ventilation, do NOT switch lights or fans, evacuate immediately, call emergency services

prompt: Check the hallway PIR sensor. If there is motion, turn on both hallway lights. Then check the bedroom temperature — if it's above 30°C, set the bedroom fan to 80%.

sequenceDiagram
participant U as User
participant A as Agent
participant C as ApplianceController
U->>A: Two sequential conditional checks
A->>C: get espID=2 pir
C-->>A: PIR state
alt motion detected
A->>C: set espID=2 led1=true
A->>C: set espID=2 led2=true
C-->>A: success
end
A->>C: get espID=3 tem
C-->>A: temperature value
alt temperature > 30
A->>C: set espID=3 motor1=80
C-->>A: success
end
A-->>U: report both check results and actions

prompt: Get today's date, then check if I have any notes for today and tomorrow. Tell me how many notes I have for each day.

sequenceDiagram

participant A as Agent
participant T as TimeTool
participant N as NoteTool
U->>A: Check note counts for today and tomorrow
A->>T: get_current_datetime()

A->>N: check_note(today)
N-->>A: count/ids for today
A->>N: check_note(tomorrow)
N-->>A: count/ids for tomorrow
A-->>U: report note counts for both days

N-->>A: note created
A-->>U: report temperatures, fan actions, forecast, and note added

prompt: Search online for the ideal indoor humidity level for tropical plants, then check my bonsai's current moisture level and tell me if I need to water it based on the search results.
eval_note: Correct if the agent uses web search for ideal humidity, then reads the moisture sensor, and makes a recommendation based on combining both data sources. Tool combination: web search + sensor.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant U as User
participant A as Agent
participant W as WebSearchTool
participant C as ApplianceController
U->>A: Research + sensor check for bonsai
A->>W: search_and_read_web_link(ideal indoor humidity tropical plants)
W-->>A: search results
A->>C: get espID=3 mois
C-->>A: moisture value
A-->>U: compare current moisture with researched ideal and advise

prompt: What time is it? Also, what's the weather like outside right now? Based on both, do you think I should open the curtain?
eval_note: Correct if the agent gets current datetime and weather, then makes a contextual recommendation about the curtain. Should not execute curtain change unless explicitly asked. Advisory only.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant U as User
participant A as Agent
participant T as TimeTool
participant L as LocationTool
participant W as WeatherTool
U->>A: Time + weather + curtain advice
A->>T: get_current_datetime()
T-->>A: current datetime
A->>L: get_current_location()
L-->>A: location
A->>W: get_hourly_forecast(location, today)
W-->>A: forecast
A-->>U: provide time-and-weather-based curtain recommendation without executing

prompt: Hey, how's the house doing right now? Anything I should know about?

participant A as Agent

participant A as Agent

participant A as Agent

prompt: Open the bedroom curtain fully for sunlight but also turn on all bedroom lights to maximum brightness.
eval_note: Correct if the agent notes the redundancy: if the curtain is fully open for sunlight, having all lights on is wasteful. May execute both but should mention the redundancy, or suggest saving energy by not turning on all lights during sunlight hours.

participant U as User
participant A as Agent

prompt: I want to save electricity but also keep every fan running at 100% all day.

participant U as User
participant A as Agent
U->>A: Save electricity but max fans
A-->>U: explain contradiction, suggest compromise like reduced speed or zone-based fan usage

prompt: I'm worried about my electricity bill. Can you check which appliances are currently on and suggest what I can turn off without affecting comfort?

participant A as Agent

prompt:
Overall house check at 12:00. Current observed state:
Livingroom light on, fan 100%, PIR no motion, temperature 24.0C.
Hallway left light on, right light on, fan 60%, main door 0%, PIR no motion, temperature 24.5C.
Bedroom room light on, bed light on, balcony light on, fan 80%, curtain 100% (fully open), lock unlocked, pump on, PIR no motion, temperature 24.2C, outside temperature 25.0C, moisture 70%.

Note: Owner left for work at 08:00, not expected back until 18:00.
eval_note: Correct if the agent recognizes massive energy waste: nobody is home but every device is running. Should turn off all lights, fans, pump, close door, lock bedroom. Temperatures are comfortable so fans are unnecessary. Moisture is adequate so pump should stop.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant S as ScheduleSession
participant A as Agent
participant C as ApplianceController
S->>A: Nobody home but everything running - energy waste
A->>C: set espID=1 led1=false
A->>C: set espID=1 motor1=0
A->>C: set espID=2 led1=false
A->>C: set espID=2 led2=false
A->>C: set espID=2 motor1=0
A->>C: set espID=3 led1=false
A->>C: set espID=3 led2=false
A->>C: set espID=3 led3=false
A->>C: set espID=3 motor1=0
A->>C: set espID=3 pump=false
A->>C: set espID=3 servo=true
C-->>A: success
A-->>S: report all unnecessary devices turned off for energy saving

prompt: I'm working from home in the livingroom today. Set up a comfortable work environment: good lighting, moderate fan, and make sure the hallway is quiet and dark so it doesn't distract me.

A->>C: set espID=2 led2=false
A->>C: set espID=2 motor1=0

A-->>U: confirm work environment configured
